title: July Workday
description:
Join us for the July workday with coffee, tea and biscuits at 12!

Our group of friendly volunteers works to maintain and improve the park. If you'd like to lend a hand please join us. No previous experience is necessary.

What we'll be doing:

Throughout the year volunteers carry out a variety of activities to improve the park for people and wildlife. This includes jobs like:

  • Planting and caring for trees, shrubs, bulbs and flowers
  • Creating habitat for wildlife in the park, for example by making dead hedges and log piles
  • Clearing litter
address: 'The Glade' Woodvale Ave, London SE25 4AN, UK
